title: senecio nevadensis
intro: Senecio nevadensis, also known as Nevada ragwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Traditionally, Senecio nevadensis is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make salves and tinctures for topical applications.
